steps.name: cli-status-command
steps.summary: obpub status <file> CLI — commander entry point + runStatus/formatStatusLine via core parseNote+classify, with config auto-discover and unsafeAllowPrivateFolder respected; 12 new vitest cases covering frontmatter/tag/tripwire/vault-bounds/relative paths.

steps.name: cli-audit-command
steps.summary: obpub audit CLI — scanDist/checks/report modules + runAudit orchestrator covering 6 dist-leak rules + strict-only authored title mention. PipelineResult exposes privateNoteTitles + allAttachments so audit consumes (not re-classifies) privacy verdicts. 20 new vitest cases (5 scanDist, 12 checks, 3 vault-mixed integration green/red).

steps.name: cli-dev-build-commands
steps.summary: obpub dev/build CLI — astroRunner spawns local node_modules/.bin/astro (PATH fallback) with SIGINT forwarding, resolveAstroCwd locates apps/blog or root config, runDev/runBuild orchestrate spawn → optional post-build runAudit with proper exit-code propagation; 20 new vitest cases (4 cwd resolution, 7 spawn/binary/SIGINT, 3 dev forwarding, 6 build/audit interaction).
